_NOTE_HYBRID_EXECUTION: Hybrid workflow: (1) Start EXECUTION_MODE=MANUAL — signals + Telegram + GUI only; you place orders; bot does not auto-trade. (2) Optional PAPER to simulate. (3) When ready for automation: set EXECUTION_MODE=AUTO, fill BROKER_CONFIG + BROKER_API path, restart — _apply_execution_mode then allows broker orders. SIGNALS = alert-only variant. EXECUTION_MODE change needs restart; RETENTION_* and many TG_/GUI_ keys soft-reload. See RCA_AND_HYBRID_MODEL.txt.
_NOTE_BROKER_FIELDS: Use BROKER_NAME, BROKER_DRIVER, and BROKER_CONFIG. Legacy vendor-specific keys may still work for backward compatibility.
_NOTE_ADAPTIVE: Rule-based adaptive layer (recent exits tighten/loosen the score bar). Logic: core/adaptive_learning.py — testable, reusable; tune caps here. Not a neural-net ML model.
_NOTE_ADVANCED_SAFETY: Advanced execution guards — all soft-reload safe. SPREAD_MAX_PCT blocks entry if bid-ask spread is too wide. SLIPPAGE_ALERT_PCT fires a warning when observed slippage exceeds this. DRAWDOWN_SIZE_SCALE reduces lot size automatically when portfolio drawdown is severe. VIX_SIZE_SCALE reduces lot size when VIX is elevated. VIX_COOLDOWN_SEC holds off entries for N seconds after VIX drops from a spike. CONSEC_LOSS_LIMIT trips a circuit-break pause after N consecutive losses. TG_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL is the periodic 'bot alive' Telegram ping. MIN_ENTRY_INTERVAL prevents rapid double-entry on the same index. CLUSTER_WINDOW_SEC suppresses a weaker duplicate signal within this window. MONDAY_GAP_GRACE_MIN skips entries in the first N minutes on Monday to avoid gap-fades.
_NOTE_OBSERVABILITY: METRICS_PORT>0 serves /metrics, /health on METRICS_BIND (default 127.0.0.1; use 0.0.0.0 only for LAN scrape). Port/bind need restart to apply. STRUCTURED_EVENTS_* is soft-reload safe. Per-machine: config.local.json (gitignored) merged after config.json.
_NOTE_INDEX_MAP: INDEX_MAP defines which indices to trade. Override only the fields you need — rest use built-in defaults. Fields: yf=Yahoo Finance ticker, nse=NSE symbol, step=strike step, lot=lot size. Add new indices here (e.g. MIDCPNIFTY) and they are picked up automatically without code changes.
_NOTE_GUI: Leave GUI_THEME / GUI_WINDOW / GUI_UX as {} to use built-in defaults; override any keys you need.
_NOTE_DIAGNOSTICS: Operational tuning — all soft-reload safe. CRASH_RECOVERY_LOG path for crash events. COMPACT_INTERVAL_SEC how often memory is compacted (seconds). LOOP_SLOW_CYCLE_MS threshold (ms) to flag a slow scan cycle in loop-health log. LOOP_HEALTH_REPORT_EVERY_N how often (iterations) a loop-health summary is printed.
_NOTE_SIGNAL_TUNING: Signal engine tuning — all soft-reload safe (no restart needed). ATR_SL_MULTIPLIER controls how many ATRs the stop-loss sits from entry. PCR_BULLISH/BEARISH set the OI ratio thresholds that add 5 pts to score. MACD_BONUS pts added when MACD histogram confirms direction. STRONG/MODERATE_THRESHOLD set the score bands shown in the GUI. FIB_TP*_RATIO are Fibonacci extension multipliers for TP1/TP2/TP3 targets. Tune these to match your risk tolerance — restart NOT required.
_NOTE_SECRETS: Prefix sensitive values with b64: for base64 obfuscation. Never commit this file to git.
_NOTE_REGIME_FILTER: Phase 1 — Regime Filter: classifies market as TRENDING/RANGING/VOLATILE. RANGING raises score bar; VOLATILE reduces size.
_NOTE_SNIPER_ENTRY: Phase 2 — Sniper Entry: requires above-average volume (and optionally a price breakout) before allowing entry.
_NOTE_SESSION_CLASSIFIER: Phase 3 — Session Classifier: score adjustments by time-of-day (OPEN +5, MIDDAY -3, CLOSE +3).
_NOTE_ADAPTIVE_SIZING: Phase 4 — Adaptive Position Sizing: Kelly-fraction + volatility-scaled lot sizing.
_NOTE_ML_CLASSIFIER: Phase 5 — ML Signal Classifier: LightGBM win-probability scorer. Inactive until ml_min_trades_to_train closed trades exist. Requires: lightgbm, scikit-learn.
_NOTE_REPORTING: Phase 6 — PDF Report Generator: EOD trade performance PDF. Requires: reportlab. Enable report_eod_auto_generate for automatic generation at shutdown.
_NOTE_EVENT_CALENDAR: Phase 7D — Event Calendar Filter: block entries or reduce size on high-volatility event days. Add dates to event_dates list: ["2026-07-23", "2026-08-06"].
_NOTE_CORRELATION_GUARD: Phase 8 — Correlation Guard: blocks same-direction entry on a correlated index when another is already open. Uses 1m Pearson r over correlation_lookback_bars bars.
